questions.text: Have you ever found something tiny that led to a big adventure?
When Leo thought it was only a tiny moment — has time ever felt tiny to you too?
What treasures has your brain found when you were on your way somewhere?

pocket.reflection: Sometimes a tiny green brick can hold a whole adventure — and that's okay. Adventures can live in Pip's pocket until you're ready to remember them.
pocket.pipLine: Another adventure. Another treasure. Another story to remember.
